examples.title: as prop — description list
examples.description: Visually hidden <dt> inside a narrow description-list layout, where the term is implied by context.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { VisuallyHidden } from '@lostgradient/cinder/visually-hidden';
</script>

<dl style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: auto 1fr; gap: 0.25rem 1rem;">
  <dt>
    <VisuallyHidden as="span">Created</VisuallyHidden>
  </dt>
  <dd>January 1, 2025</dd>

  <dt>
    <VisuallyHidden as="span">Updated</VisuallyHidden>
  </dt>
  <dd>March 15, 2025</dd>

  <dt>
    <VisuallyHidden as="span">Author</VisuallyHidden>
  </dt>
  <dd>Alice Smith</dd>
</dl>

examples.title: Icon-only button label
examples.description: Supplemental label for an icon-only button — visible to screen readers, hidden from sighted users.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Button } from '@lostgradient/cinder/button';
  import { VisuallyHidden } from '@lostgradient/cinder/visually-hidden';
</script>

<Button>
  <svg
    xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
    width="16"
    height="16"
    viewBox="0 0 24 24"
    fill="none"
    stroke="currentColor"
    stroke-width="2"
    stroke-linecap="round"
    stroke-linejoin="round"
    aria-hidden="true"
  >
    <rect width="14" height="14" x="8" y="8" rx="2" ry="2" />
    <path d="M4 16c-1.1 0-2-.9-2-2V4c0-1.1.9-2 2-2h10c1.1 0 2 .9 2 2" />
  </svg>
  <VisuallyHidden>Copy code to clipboard</VisuallyHidden>
</Button>

examples.title: Skip link
examples.description: Focusable skip link revealed on keyboard focus. Tab into this example to see it appear.
examples.code:
Skip to main content
Home About Contact

Main content area.
